name: Cherry Pinwheels
recipeIngredient: 1 Sour cherries (or 2 1/2 cups sweetened sour cherries)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the cherries well, saving the juice.
2. Mix and sift flour, baking powder, and salt into a bowl.
3. Cut in butter until crumbly.
4. Add milk; mix quickly just enough to moisten.
5. Turn dough onto a floured surface and knead lightly for a few seconds.
6. Roll out into a rectangle 1/4 inch thick.
7. Spread 1-1/4 cups cherries over the dough.
8. Roll up like a jelly roll, then cut into 6 pieces with a sharp knife.
9. Place cut side down in a greased shallow baking pan.
10. Brush with milk and bake at 450°F for 12-15 minutes or until done.
11. Mix sugar and cornstarch; stir in cherry juice slowly until thickened.
12. Add remaining cherries and more sugar if desired.
13. Serve warm on the pinwheels with ice cream or sherbet (6 servings).
